That means approximately 8,000 people will see their jobs cut. Meta will also be closing around 6,000 open roles, according to Gale. The cuts follow Meta's significant investments […]

items.title: Qi2 15W 3-in-1 MagSafe charging stations don’t get much less than this, steal this one for just $15 (65% off)
items.summary:
Courtesy of LISEN’s B-King storefront at Amazon, you can now grab one of the brand’s Qi2-certified 15W 3-in-1 charging stations for $14.99 shipped. Don’t forget to clip the on-page 50% coupon to see the discounted price at checkout. This model has sold for as much as $44 in recent months, so today’s offer knocks a solid $29 off the going rate. That 65% price drop lands it $5 below the previous all-time low, setting a new best price we’ve tracked. It doesn’t get much less than this for a Qi2 15W charging station, which even comes with a 20W adapter and a 3.3-foot USB-C cable, so be sure to snag it after getting more details below.

items.title: Nomad intros new Forest Green colorway for its titanium Stratos Apple Watch band

Last fall Nomad introduced the world to its hybrid titanium Apple Watch band known as Stratos, and it’s seriously gorgeous. One of the more compelling, interesting-looking, and well-made titanium bands I have tested out and wear personally, it updated the lineup with an Icy Blue glow model back in January, and has now dropped a new Forest Green variant.

items.title: This travel-ready 7-in-1 power strip packs 65W USB-C for $27 (Save $10)
items.summary:
ORICO 65W 7-in-1 USB-C Travel Power Strip

Buy for $27 (Reg. $37)

Clip the on-page 10% off coupon.

What we love

A lot of the affordable power strips with USB-C tend to top out at 15-20W, but this travel-ready solution steps things up to 65W. This makes it powerful enough to top off a wide variety of devices ranging from smartphones to tablets, laptops, and the list goes on. It’s a versatile solution with 3 AC outlets, two USB-A ports, and a couple of Type-C outputs in tow.
